questions.question: Describe the key property of a One-time Pad, which enables it to be secure against eavesdropping.
questions.hint: One-time Pad involves using a random key for encryption.

questions.question: What is the main disadvantage of using a One-time Pad for encryption?
questions.hint: Due to its high key size, One-time Pads can be impractical to use.

questions.question: Explain the process of generating a valid One-time Pad, including the required parameters.
questions.hint: One-time Pad requires a random binary string of equal length to the plaintext.
